title: phip:compliance
description: Schema for the phip:compliance attribute namespace. Covers the condition layer (Section 9.4), certifications, life limits, and chain of custody metadata. Applicable to all object types on the manufacturing track.

condition.description: Fitness-for-purpose assessment, orthogonal to lifecycle state. An object can be 'deployed' but 'condemned', or 'stock' but 'degraded'.

condition_reason.description: Human-readable reason for the current condition (e.g. 'temperature_exceedance', 'impact_damage', 'scheduled_inspection').

condition_set_by.description: PhIP URI of the actor who set the condition.

condition_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the condition was assessed.

certifications.description: List of certifications or regulatory approvals held by this object.

expires_date.description: Date the certification expires, if applicable.

life_limit_hours.description: Maximum operational hours before mandatory replacement or overhaul.

life_limit_cycles.description: Maximum operational cycles (e.g. pressurization cycles, thermal cycles) before mandatory action.

hours_since_new.description: Total operational hours accumulated since manufacture.

cycles_since_new.description: Total operational cycles accumulated since manufacture.

hours_since_overhaul.description: Operational hours accumulated since last overhaul.

next_inspection_date.description: Date of next scheduled inspection or maintenance action.

chain_of_custody.description: Ordered list of custodians this object has passed through. Informational — the authoritative chain is derived from the event history.

custodian.description: PhIP URI or name of the custodian.

to.description: End of custody period. Null or absent if current.
